pi_items.source: Task description step 2: 'Add a Text object...and change the text content to OPEN'
Task description step 3: 'set Geometry > Extrude to 0.15 m'. This is the target value; metadata min of 0.05 is a more permissive acceptance threshold.
Task description step 3 specifies target 0.15m; metadata max of 0.5 is a more permissive acceptance threshold.
Task description step 4: 'Set Geometry > Bevel > Depth to 0.02 m'. Metadata min of 0.001 is a more permissive acceptance threshold.
Task description step 6: 'Metallic: 1.0 (fully metallic)'. Metadata min of 0.8 is less strict than the specified target value of 1.0.
Task description step 6: 'Roughness: Between 0.2 and 0.4'. Metadata max of 0.5 is a more permissive acceptance threshold.
Task description step 7: 'save the image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_render.png'
Task description step 8: 'Save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_scene.blend'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Blender 3D modeling task with no external data sources. The task requires an agent to create a 3D 'OPEN' text sign with specified properties: text content 'OPEN', extrude depth 0.15m, bevel depth 0.02m with resolution 3, gold metallic material (RGB 0.8/0.55/0.1, metallic 1.0, roughness 0.2-0.4), positioned at origin, rendered to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_render.png, and saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_scene.blend. All metadata verification thresholds are consistent with or less strict than the task specification.
